languages.text: {n}Ювенна делает несколько судорожных вдохов, возвращая себе самообладание.{/n} "Я... верю в это. Моя жизнь в твоих руках, но я все еще дышу, и это весомое доказательство. Предложение принято".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ювенна делает несколько судорожных вдохов, возвращая себе самообладание.{/n} "Я... верю в это. Моя жизнь в твоих руках, но я все еще дышу, и это весомое доказательство. Предложение принято".

languages.text: {n}Juvenna takes a few ragged breaths, regaining her composure.{/n} "I... believe you. My life is in your hands, but I am still breathing, and that is compelling evidence. I accept your offer."
languages.original_text: {n}Ювенна делает несколько судорожных вдохов, возвращая себе самообладание.{/n} "Я... верю в это. Моя жизнь в твоих руках, но я все еще дышу, и это весомое доказательство. Предложение принято".

{n}Juvenna takes a few ragged breaths, regaining her composure.{/n} "I... believe you. My life is in your hands, but I am still breathing, and that is compelling evidence. I accept your offer."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna respira con dificultad para recuperar la compostura.{/n} «L{mf|e|a}... creo. Mi vida está en sus manos, pero sigo respirando y eso es una prueba convincente. Acepto su oferta».
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna takes a few ragged breaths, regaining her composure.{/n} "I... believe you. My life is in your hands, but I am still breathing, and that is compelling evidence. I accept your offer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna respira con dificultad para recuperar la compostura.{/n} «L{mf|e|a}... creo. Mi vida está en sus manos, pero sigo respirando y eso es una prueba convincente. Acepto su oferta».

languages.text: {n}尤文娜急促地喘了几口气，勉强恢复了镇定。{/n}“我……相信你。我的命在你手里，可我还活着，这就是最有说服力的证明。我接受你的提议。”
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna takes a few ragged breaths, regaining her composure.{/n} "I... believe you. My life is in your hands, but I am still breathing, and that is compelling evidence. I accept your offer."

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜急促地喘了几口气，勉强恢复了镇定。{/n}“我……相信你。我的命在你手里，可我还活着，这就是最有说服力的证明。我接受你的提议。”

languages.text: {n}Juvenna inspire avec difficulté, tâchant de reprendre contenance.{/n} « C'est bon... je vous crois. Ma vie est entre vos mains, mais je respire encore, et c'est là une preuve suffisante de votre bonne foi. J'accepte votre offre. »
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna takes a few ragged breaths, regaining her composure.{/n} "I... believe you. My life is in your hands, but I am still breathing, and that is compelling evidence. I accept your offer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna inspire avec difficulté, tâchant de reprendre contenance.{/n} « C'est bon... je vous crois. Ma vie est entre vos mains, mais je respire encore, et c'est là une preuve suffisante de votre bonne foi. J'accepte votre offre. »

languages.text: {n}Juvenna, birkaç kesik nefes alarak kendini toparlıyor.{/n} "Sana... İnanıyorum. Hayatım senin ellerinde ama hâlâ nefes alıyorum ve bu ikna edici bir kanıt. Teklifini kabul ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna takes a few ragged breaths, regaining her composure.{/n} "I... believe you. My life is in your hands, but I am still breathing, and that is compelling evidence. I accept your offer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna, birkaç kesik nefes alarak kendini toparlıyor.{/n} "Sana... İnanıyorum. Hayatım senin ellerinde ama hâlâ nefes alıyorum ve bu ikna edici bir kanıt. Teklifini kabul ediyorum."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna atmet einige Male ein, um ihre Fassung wiederzuerlangen.{/n} "Ich ... glaube Euch. Mein Leben liegt in Euren Händen, aber noch atme ich, so viel steht fest. Ich nehme Euer Angebot an."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna takes a few ragged breaths, regaining her composure.{/n} "I... believe you. My life is in your hands, but I am still breathing, and that is compelling evidence. I accept your offer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna atmet einige Male ein, um ihre Fassung wiederzuerlangen.{/n} "Ich ... glaube Euch. Mein Leben liegt in Euren Händen, aber noch atme ich, so viel steht fest. Ich nehme Euer Angebot an."

languages.text: {n}ジュベナは数回息を荒く吸い込み、落ち着きを取り戻す。{/n}「…信じます。私の命はあなたの手に委ねられています。でも、私はまだ息をしています。それが証拠です。あなたの申し出を受けます。」
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna takes a few ragged breaths, regaining her composure.{/n} "I... believe you. My life is in your hands, but I am still breathing, and that is compelling evidence. I accept your offer."
